author: serenita_io
content:
Hey all, I'd like to get feedback on the idea of a bring-your-own-bid variant of the `produceBlockV4` endpoint.

In simple VC<->BN setups it makes sense for the beacon node to handle the entire bid selection. However, in multi-node setups where the VC talks to multiple beacon nodes, that makes less sense since those multiple beacon nodes would end up requesting the exact same data from the same set of builders at the same time.

For that reason I believe it would be useful to allow the VC to handle bid selection and supply a bid to the beacon node for beacon block inclusion. Beacon nodes would still override the VC's supplied bid when their circuit breakers are active, or under any other BN-decided circumstances that warrant it (e.g. invalid bid).

Another usecase for this endpoint involves arbitrarily complex bid preferences: validator clients could support any options they want without the need to overcomplicate the Beacon API to account for them.

Implementation-wise this should be easy to do on the beacon node side.

PoC Lodestar beacon node implementation: https://github.com/eth2353/lodestar/commit/495c0ce53f9d030ee0139362dd328f6403b737ed
Beacon-API PR: https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/627

Open questions / current issues:

- separate API endpoint vs part of produceBlockV4 itself?
- `payload_attributes` SSE event - all CL clients would also need to support this, last time I tried I believe Nimbus didn't have this
